arts.ttl: Preview: Portsmouth vs. Leeds United - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Championship clash between Portsmouth and Leeds United, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Everton to appoint Leeds' Kinnear as chief executive
arts.sum: Everton will appoint Angus Kinnear as their new chief executive, with the Leeds United CEO beginning the role on 1 June.

Leeds team news pre-Portsmouth: Bamford in team training, Wöber and Ampadu recovering well A draw started their March run of fixtures against an impressive West Brom side, but Leeds will be eager to get back to winning ways this weekend against Portsmouth.

arts.ttl: Millwall man slapped with extended FA ban and set to miss key games against Portsmouth and Sunderland
arts.sum: Millwall goalkeeper Liam Roberts has been further punished by the Football Association (FA).

arts.ttl: Everton usher in ‘sporting leadership team’ era with Leeds CEO set to arrive
arts.sum: Leadership team to replace director of football model Leeds CEO Angus Kinnear will head to Everton in June Everton have announced several changes to how the club will be run under The Friedkin Group, with Angus Kinnear arriving as CEO from Leeds and Kevin Thelwell leaving as director of football when his contract expires this summer. Everton’s new owners intend to end the director of football model and transition to a wider “sporting leadership team”. Thelwell has been director of football since 2022 and helped steer the club through a turbulent period under Farhad Moshiri, including two points deductions and serious financial constraints, but will leave at the end of the season. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Alexander Milosevic: who is the new Portsmouth defender? Why was he a free agent? How can he aid the Blues' Championship survival hopes?
arts.sum: Pompey have announced the signing of Sweden international defender Alexander Milosevic on a short-term deal until the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Leeds confirm Kinnear exit and McCormick appointment
arts.sum: Leeds United have confirmed that Angus Kinnear will be leaving his role as CEO at the end of the season, with Peter McCormick appointed as Executive Vice Chairman in the meantime. The 72-year-old from Harrogate has stepped down from his role within the Premier League to take up his new position at Elland Road as Executive Vice Chairman.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth announce new signing just before Leeds United clash
arts.sum: Leeds United face off against Portsmouth this weekend, and John Mousinho could be welcoming a fresh face into his squad after a new signing on Friday. As both Farke and John Mousinho prepare their sides for Sunday’s lunchtime clash at Fratton Park, the hosts look set to have a new face in their matchday squad.

arts.ttl: Everton's new owners make statement with Leeds appointment and transfer changes
arts.sum: Everton are about to embark upon a new era as they leave Goodison Park at the end of the season, with the club's new owners implementing changes in the boardroom as well

arts.ttl: 'We scoured the markets' - Portsmouth boss explains decision to sign Sweden international defender on free transfer ahead of Leeds game
arts.sum: John Mousinho has explained the club’s decision to bring in Sweden defender Alexander Milosevic on a free transfer.
